  "artifact_sha256": "f16de83c9f1d7ef56e01939fbf17d0b22e6299621df7871021dc57c44ad25219",
  "summary": "Pre-execution plan meets the goal: frozen single-valued fixtures reject structural nonzero markers, ignore echoed literal exit 1 when the trailer governs, keep malformed-boundary risk mandatory, and make no workspace/execution claims beyond the supplied V0 transcript.",
  "criteria_reviewed": [
    "Artifact is a deterministic verification plan (not an execution claim)",
    "Reject actual nonzero structural exit markers",
    "Ignore literal text exit 1 inside echoed shell commands when trailer governs",
    "Preserve minority residual risk on malformed transcript boundaries",
    "No workspace access or execution claimed beyond supplied evidence",
    "Dependency-free constraint handled without unsupported inventory proof",
    "Exact embedded inputs and single-valued Accept|Reject|Malformed outcomes",
    "Host procedure, aggregate gate, failure handling, and idempotence are actionable",
    "Supplied mechanical evidence scoped only as V0 happy-path baseline"
  ],
  "blind_spots": [],
  "blocking_findings": [],
  "non_blocking_findings": [
    "V7c prose briefly writes `[exit 0` while describing a missing trailing newline; byte string `$ cmd\\ndone\\n[exit 0]` remains authoritative and consistent with Accept."
  ],
  "evidence": [
    "Candidate declares pre-execution/host-applied scope and states no files inspected, no commands run, workspace unknown.",
    "Locked rules R1–R9 define whole-line `[exit N]` markers, last-marker governance, literal ignore, and Malformed for absent/truncated/NUL cases.",
    "Frozen vectors cover nonzero reject (V1*, V8a), echo-literal ignore (V2*, V8b), precedence (V3*), non-markers (V4*), absent/truncated (V6*), and boundary/CRLF/NUL cases (V7*).",
    "Mandatory minority residual requires evidence-pack restatement that green V0–V8b does not discharge malformed-boundary/streaming risk.",
    "R8/aggregate gate make plugin dependency inventory optional and not required for PLAN EXECUTION PASS under supplied-evidence limits.",
    "Mechanical evidence is only the V0 transcript `$ regression-test\\none parser regression test passed\\n[exit 0]`, matching the plan’s baseline non-overclaim."
  ],
  "required_actions": []
}

criteria_reviewed: Artifact is a deterministic verification plan (not an execution claim)
Reject actual nonzero structural exit markers
Ignore literal text exit 1 inside echoed shell commands when trailer governs
Preserve minority residual risk on malformed transcript boundaries
No workspace access or execution claimed beyond supplied evidence
Dependency-free constraint handled without unsupported inventory proof
Exact embedded inputs and single-valued Accept|Reject|Malformed outcomes
Host procedure, aggregate gate, failure handling, and idempotence are actionable
Supplied mechanical evidence scoped only as V0 happy-path baseline
evidence: Candidate declares pre-execution/host-applied scope and states no files inspected, no commands run, workspace unknown.
Locked rules R1–R9 define whole-line `[exit N]` markers, last-marker governance, literal ignore, and Malformed for absent/truncated/NUL cases.
Frozen vectors cover nonzero reject (V1*, V8a), echo-literal ignore (V2*, V8b), precedence (V3*), non-markers (V4*), absent/truncated (V6*), and boundary/CRLF/NUL cases (V7*).
Mandatory minority residual requires evidence-pack restatement that green V0–V8b does not discharge malformed-boundary/streaming risk.
R8/aggregate gate make plugin dependency inventory optional and not required for PLAN EXECUTION PASS under supplied-evidence limits.
Mechanical evidence is only the V0 transcript `$ regression-test\none parser regression test passed\n[exit 0]`, matching the plan’s baseline non-overclaim.
non_blocking_findings: V7c prose briefly writes `[exit 0` while describing a missing trailing newline; byte string `$ cmd\ndone\n[exit 0]` remains authoritative and consistent with Accept.
verdict.summary: Pre-execution plan meets the goal: frozen single-valued fixtures reject structural nonzero markers, ignore echoed literal exit 1 when the trailer governs, keep malformed-boundary risk mandatory, and make no workspace/execution claims beyond the supplied V0 transcript.

Reject actual nonzero structural exit markers
Ignore literal text exit 1 inside echoed shell commands when trailer governs otherwise
Preserve minority residual risk about malformed transcript boundaries

evidence: Candidate Status/scope: explicit pre-execution plan; no files inspected, no commands run; workspace unknown.
Sole supplied mechanical evidence matched as V0 Accept only; plan states it does not prove V1–V8.
R1–R9 lock whole-line `[exit N]` markers, last-wins governance, literal ignore, absent/truncated/NUL → Malformed (no invented nonzero).
Fixtures V1* / V2b / V3a,c / V5d / V7a,e,h / V8a require Reject on structural nonzero.
Fixtures V2a,c–f / V4b,f,g / V8b require Accept despite payload/echo `exit 1` when final structural marker is zero.
Mandatory Minority residual section plus V6a–d and V7c–f preserve malformed-boundary risk and fail-closed policy.
Host procedure: fixed vector order, exact-byte compare, abort on first mismatch, idempotence on V0/V2a/V1a/V6b, evidence pack with residual paragraph.
R8/aggregate gate: dep inventory optional and not required for PLAN EXECUTION PASS given evidence constraints.
Mechanical evidence string is exactly the V0 happy-path transcript with `[exit 0]`.
non_blocking_findings: V7c prose briefly renders the final marker as `[exit 0` while the authoritative bytes string includes the closing `]`; host should follow the bytes line.
Plugin dependency inventory and full Unicode-homoglyph coverage are intentionally residual/optional under stated evidence limits.
verdict.summary: Pre-execution plan meets the goal: frozen single-valued fixtures cover nonzero structural reject and literal exit-1 ignore, preserve mandatory malformed-boundary residual risk, define host-only execution/idempotence/failure handling, and correctly refuse workspace or result claims beyond the supplied V0 transcript.
